tasks.subject: Explore existing codebase patterns
tasks.description: Read key existing files to understand patterns: database.py, main.py, existing blog models, admin routes, blog frontend pages

tasks.subject: Add blog_series and blog_series_posts tables to database.py
tasks.description: Add the two new tables to backend/app/database.py matching existing patterns

tasks.subject: Create backend/app/blog_series.py with models, repository, and routes
tasks.description: Create the blog_series.py module with Pydantic models, repository classes, and admin/public routes

tasks.subject: Wire blog_series into backend/app/main.py
tasks.description: Add import, repository init, and router inclusion in main.py

tasks.subject: Add series info to blog detail page and create series pages
tasks.description: Modify frontend/app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx to show series info + part navigation. Create frontend/app/blog/series/[slug]/page.tsx for series listing. Create frontend/app/admin/blog-series/page.tsx for admin management.

tasks.subject: Run pytest and TypeScript checks
tasks.description: Run python -m pytest backend/tests/ -q --tb=short and cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit to verify everything works
